domain: Drosera sundew two-tentacle prey capture (snap 75ms + glue 2min)
specific_mechanism: Two anatomically distinct, two-timescaled, parallel-acting capture organs; fast-ballistic + slow-refinement on the same target.
llm_application: DROSERA: bicameral inference with two CONCURRENT parallel attention substrates — low-rank linearized snap (<100ms ballistic draft) + full quadratic glue (~2s refinement). Snap delivered as initial answer; glue arrives as refinement-correction if delta exceeds threshold.
novelty_claim: SampleAttention (2406.15486) is two-stage sequential single substrate; Star Attention (2411.17116) is two-phase sequential; Win-Fast (2505.19481) is mode-switch single resource. DROSERA is parallel-bicameral with the snap streamed before glue completes — not a published combination.
